properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why would I worry When giants come calling my name? My God is so much bigger than troubles I face, Why would I hunger For power or riches or fame? Oh, 'cause my God is so much better than all of these things.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I won't be shaken, I won't be moved, My God is faithful, His promise is true, So I'll speak to the mountains, "Oh, it's time to move, 'Cause my God is bigger, better, stronger, greater than you."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My enemies scatter 'Cause they know the battle is done, My God is stronger, the victory's already won, Yeah, He died for my ransom And rose up on the third day Oh, 'cause my God is greater than death, hell, and the grave.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, I won't be shaken, Oh, I won't be moved, My God is faithful, His promise is true So I speak to the mountains "Oh, it's time to move 'Cause my God is bigger, better, stronger, greater than you" oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's no mountain too high No valley too low There's no fear that I have He doesn't already know There's no problem too big There's no weapon too strong There is nothing for God that's impossible.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's no mountain too high No valley too low There's no fear that I have He doesn't already know There's no problem too big There's no weapon too strong There is nothing for God that's impossible (Nothing's impossible)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I won't be shaken No, I won't be moved My God is faithful (oh, He's so faithful) His promise is true So I speak to the mountains "Oh, it's time to move

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: 'Cause my God is bigger, better, stronger, greater, Bigger, better, stronger, greater, Bigger, better, stronger, greater, Bigger, better, stronger, greater, Bigger, better, stronger, greater than you."
